prompt: A surreal split image down the center. LEFT: A decaying Moronia — crumbling towers, toxic sky, people in grey queues, military drones overhead. RIGHT: A thriving Wishonia — organic luminous architecture, clean skies, people in gardens, floating platforms. The split line is sharp and stark. Same species. Same atoms. Different choices. 70s prog rock album cover style. Vivid contrast between despair and hope.
